body:
This postproc is only turned on when the simulation time is greater or equal to 400 days. The first 200 days are thrown away for the statistics computation.

It produces plots comparable to Figs 1-3 in [this paper](https://journals.ametsoc.org/view/journals/bams/75/10/1520-0477_1994_075_1825_apftio_2_0_co_2.xml?tab_body=pdf). Fig 4 needs additional capability of spectra calculation, which will be added later.

closes #421
title: Improve postproc for dry held-suarez

body:
We're using an old version of the formatter, and running into [this issue](https://github.com/domluna/JuliaFormatter.jl/issues/575). This PR
 - 1) upgrades our formatter compat to the latest version 0.22
 - 2) Applies the formatter
 - 3) Changes the margin to 120

Any opposition to 3)?

EDIT: I'll just apply the changes that are necessary to fix CI
title: Upgrade and apply formatter

body:
This PR is a prep PR for adding edmf. It makes more sense to use dispatch over further specializing with `Val` over more symbols that come with using edmf. So, this PR adds and uses some types, some of which will be used to create an edmf model, so that we can create the state vector. I think that the cache is nearly finished / compatible, so we're getting pretty close.

None of this is final, I think there's still many changes to come, it's just a small step towards being compatible with edmf requirements.

Once all of this is in, @dennisYatunin can apply the driver revamp and I suspect much of this will be more polished
title: Define and use some types

body: Note that this will increase ci time by a factor of two. We can reduce t_end if needed. Any thoughts?
title: change default model top for non baroclinic wave examples

body:
This PR
 - moves all the CLIMAParameter into a separate file, `parameter_set.jl`, and 
 - `time_to_seconds` into `utilities.jl`

This is a prep PR for merging in TC. This is just a stepping stone to help manage the different clima parameter set options.
title: Centralize clima params def and construction

body: This PR upgrades us to the latest version of TC which has an interface change in `surface_params`, which should help make initialization easier when merging TC into the driver.
title: Up TC compat and deps
